headline: Woman's Left Leg Has Different Political Opinions Than Her Right Leg, She Can't Walk Straight
summary: The left leg votes left. The right leg votes right. She's been walking in circles for 3 days.
fullBody: Amanda McLegs has discovered her legs have opposing political views. 'The left leg is progressive,' Amanda said. 'The right leg is traditionalist.' She has been walking in circles for 3 days. 'They keep arguing,' Amanda said. 'I just want to go to the store.' Her legs are now in political therapy. The therapist recommended 'finding common ground' and 'maybe walking in a straight line.' Amanda is 'hopeful but exhausted.'
